parameters.subject: Quotation request form
parameters.html:
=Hello{{ $json.fromName ? " " + $json.fromName : "" }},

Please complete this secure quotation form and upload your BOQ and specification files:

Open quotation form

The form is mobile-friendly. After submission, we will email the generated DOCX quotation back to you.

parameters.formDescription: Complete the details below and upload your BOQ and specification files. After submission, quotation generation will start and the result will be emailed to you.

values.html:
Files

Upload the BOQ and specification here. Do not email the files separately.

values.formSubmittedText: Details submitted successfully. Your quotation is being generated and we will email you shortly.

options.customCss: :root { --font-family: Inter, Arial, sans-serif; --border-radius-card: 8px; --color-primary: #2563eb; } body { background: #f7f8fb; } .form-container { max-width: 760px; }

parameters.content:
## Email Quotation Intake - Layer 1

Receives Gmail/IMAP messages with subject `quotation`, replies with the n8n form link, then submits form uploads and metadata to the shared Core Sub-Workflow.

Requires n8n credentials named `Gmail IMAP` and `Gmail SMTP`. Update the visible From address placeholders after credentials are configured.

meta.description: Layer 1 email platform workflow. Uses Gmail IMAP/SMTP and n8n Form, then delegates to the shared Core Sub-Workflow.
